title: My Morning Routine
summary: A man describes his daily morning routine before going to work.
body: Every morning, I wake up at six thirty. My alarm clock rings and I get out of bed. First, I go to the bathroom. I wash my face and brush my teeth. Then I take a shower. The shower is warm and I feel clean after it. After my shower, I get dressed. I put on my work clothes. I wear a blue shirt and dark trousers. Next, I go to the kitchen. I make a cup of coffee. I also eat breakfast. I usually have two eggs and toast with butter. I drink my coffee while I read the news on my phone. Breakfast takes about fifteen minutes. After breakfast, I put on my shoes and my jacket. I check that I have my keys and my wallet. Then I leave the house. I walk to the bus stop. It is only five minutes from my house. I take the bus to work. The bus ride is about twenty minutes. I arrive at my office at eight o'clock. I say good morning to my colleagues and start my day. I like my morning routine because it helps me feel ready for work.

annotations.exampleEn: I set my alarm clock for six o'clock every morning.
You should brush your teeth twice a day.
He takes a shower every morning before work.
She gets dressed quickly when she is late.
He wears dark trousers to the office every day.
I always have toast with butter for breakfast.
Don't forget your wallet when you leave the house.
I wait at the bus stop every morning.
The bus ride to school takes thirty minutes.
I have lunch with my colleagues at work.
A good morning routine helps you start the day well.
A good breakfast makes me feel ready for the day.

grammarNotes.title: Simple present for habitual routines
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Simple present (hiện tại đơn) dùng để mô tả thói quen hàng ngày: 'I wake up at six thirty.' / 'I take the bus to work.' / 'I arrive at my office at eight o'clock.' Trạng từ tần suất thường đứng trước động từ chính: 'I usually have two eggs.'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: The simple present describes daily habits: 'I wake up at six thirty.' / 'I take the bus to work.' / 'I arrive at my office at eight o'clock.' Frequency adverbs go before the main verb: 'I usually have two eggs.'

grammarNotes.title: Sequencing words
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Từ nối trình tự dùng để sắp xếp các hành động theo thứ tự: 'First, I go to the bathroom.' / 'Then I take a shower.' / 'Next, I go to the kitchen.' / 'After breakfast, I put on my shoes.' Những từ này giúp câu chuyện rõ ràng và dễ theo dõi hơn.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Sequencing words order actions: 'First, I go to the bathroom.' / 'Then I take a shower.' / 'Next, I go to the kitchen.' / 'After breakfast, I put on my shoes.' These words make a narrative clear and easy to follow.

translationVi: Mỗi buổi sáng, tôi thức dậy lúc sáu giờ rưỡi. Đồng hồ báo thức reo và tôi ra khỏi giường. Đầu tiên, tôi vào phòng tắm. Tôi rửa mặt và đánh răng. Sau đó tôi tắm vòi sen. Vòi sen ấm và tôi cảm thấy sạch sẽ sau đó. Sau khi tắm, tôi mặc quần áo. Tôi mặc quần áo đi làm. Tôi mặc áo sơ mi xanh và quần tối màu. Tiếp theo, tôi vào bếp. Tôi pha một tách cà phê. Tôi cũng ăn sáng. Tôi thường ăn hai quả trứng và bánh mì nướng với bơ. Tôi uống cà phê trong khi đọc tin tức trên điện thoại. Bữa sáng mất khoảng mười lăm phút. Sau bữa sáng, tôi đi giày và mặc áo khoác. Tôi kiểm tra xem mình có chìa khóa và ví tiền không. Sau đó tôi rời khỏi nhà. Tôi đi bộ đến trạm xe buýt. Chỉ mất năm phút từ nhà tôi. Tôi đi xe buýt đến nơi làm việc. Chuyến xe buýt khoảng hai mươi phút. Tôi đến văn phòng lúc tám giờ. Tôi chào buổi sáng các đồng nghiệp và bắt đầu ngày làm việc. Tôi thích thói quen buổi sáng của mình vì nó giúp tôi cảm thấy sẵn sàng cho công việc.

questions.prompt: What time does the narrator wake up?
questions.explanation: 'Every morning, I wake up at six thirty.'

questions.prompt: What does the narrator do first in the bathroom?
options: Wash his face and brush his teeth
questions.explanation: 'I wash my face and brush my teeth.'

questions.prompt: What colour shirt does the narrator wear?
questions.explanation: 'I wear a blue shirt and dark trousers.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about his clothes.

questions.prompt: What does the narrator usually eat for breakfast?
options: Two eggs and toast with butter
questions.explanation: 'I usually have two eggs and toast with butter.'

questions.prompt: What does the narrator do while eating breakfast?
options: He reads the news on his phone
questions.explanation: 'I drink my coffee while I read the news on my phone.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about what he does during breakfast.
Find the sentence about breakfast time.

questions.prompt: What does the narrator check before leaving the house?
questions.explanation: 'I check that I have my keys and my wallet.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about checking things.

questions.prompt: How far is the bus stop from his house?
questions.explanation: 'It is only five minutes from my house.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the bus stop.

questions.prompt: How long is the bus ride to work?
questions.explanation: 'The bus ride is about twenty minutes.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the bus journey.

questions.prompt: What time does the narrator arrive at the office?
questions.explanation: 'I arrive at my office at eight o'clock.'
questions.hint: Find the arrival time at work.

questions.prompt: Who does the narrator greet when he arrives at work?
questions.explanation: 'I say good morning to my colleagues.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about arriving at the office.

questions.prompt: Why does the narrator like his morning routine?
options: Because it helps him feel ready for work
questions.explanation: 'I like my morning routine because it helps me feel ready for work.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: The narrator follows the same routine every morning. Do you think having a morning routine is important? What is your morning routine, and is there anything you would like to change about it?
